title: clinosim: Clinically Realistic Hospital Data Simulator
description: Population-driven, physiology-based synthetic Electronic Health Record generator. Every patient carries a hidden 13-variable physiological state and every lab, vital, medication, and diagnosis is derived from that state. FHIR R4 Bulk Data Access output; multi-country (US and JP) locale packs; JP Core FHIR profile compliance on 16 primary resource types; 32 inpatient diseases and 46 ED / outpatient conditions; deterministic seeded reproduction (byte-identical output within a MINOR release line).
